name: Atal Pension Yojana
benefit: Guaranteed pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month after age 60
benefit_hindi: 60 saal ki umar ke baad har mahine ₹1,000 se ₹5,000 pension

eligibility.description: Indian citizens aged 18-40 years with a bank account
eligibility.description_hindi: 18 se 40 saal ke Bharatiya naagrik jinka bank account hai
criteria: Must have a savings bank account
Must have Aadhaar and mobile number linked to bank

steps: Visit your bank where you have savings account
Monthly contribution auto-debited from bank account
Contribution depends on age and pension amount chosen
steps_hindi: Apne bank mein jaayein jahan savings account hai
Har mahine bank se paisa automatic kat jayega
Kitna katega ye aapki umar aur pension par depend karta hai
60 saal ki umar se pension milna shuru hoga

hindi_summary: Atal Pension Yojana mein 60 saal ke baad har mahine pension milti hai. ₹1,000 se ₹5,000 tak pension chun sakte hain. Jitni jaldi shuru karoge utna kam bharna padega. 18 saal ki umar mein shuru karein toh ₹5,000 pension ke liye har mahine sirf ₹210 bharna padega. Bank mein jaake form bharein.
